FR-01.title: Student Registration and Enrollment
requirements: Students can register with email and password
Students can browse available courses
Students can enroll in courses
System tracks enrollment history
acceptance_criteria: Student account is created successfully
Course catalog shows available courses
Enrollment adds student to course
Enrollment history is accurately maintained

FR-02.title: Course Creation by Instructors
requirements: Instructors can create courses with title, description, and syllabus
Courses support multiple modules and lessons
Instructors can upload video lectures and documents
Course can be published or kept as draft
acceptance_criteria: Course is created with all required fields
Modules and lessons can be ordered
Video and document uploads work correctly
Draft courses are not visible to students

FR-03.title: Video Lecture Playback
requirements: Students can watch video lectures within the platform
Video player supports pause, seek, and playback speed
System tracks video progress per student
Resume from last watched position
acceptance_criteria: Video plays without buffering on stable connection
Playback controls work correctly
Progress is saved automatically
Student resumes from last position on return

FR-04.title: Quiz and Assessment System
requirements: Instructors can create quizzes with multiple choice questions
Quizzes can have time limits
System auto-grades multiple choice quizzes
Students can view quiz results and correct answers
acceptance_criteria: Quiz is created with correct questions and answers
Timer enforces time limit
Auto-grading produces correct scores
Results show score and correct answers

FR-05.title: Assignment Submission
requirements: Instructors can create assignments with due dates
Students can submit files and text for assignments
Late submissions are flagged
Instructors can grade and provide feedback
acceptance_criteria: Assignment is created with due date
Students can upload files up to 25MB
Late flag appears for overdue submissions
Grade and feedback are visible to student

FR-06.title: Progress Tracking Dashboard
requirements: Students can view course completion percentage
Dashboard shows completed and pending lessons
Progress bar for each enrolled course
Certificate generated on course completion
acceptance_criteria: Completion percentage matches actual progress
Dashboard shows accurate lesson status
Progress bar updates after each lesson
Certificate is downloadable as PDF

FR-07.title: Discussion Forum
requirements: Each course has a discussion forum
Students and instructors can create threads
Users can reply to threads
Instructor answers are highlighted
acceptance_criteria: Forum is accessible from course page
Threads are created and displayed correctly
Replies appear under correct thread
Instructor replies have a distinct badge

FR-08.title: Course Rating and Review
requirements: Students can rate courses with 1-5 stars
Students can write text reviews
Average rating displayed on course page
Only enrolled students can review
acceptance_criteria: Rating is submitted successfully
Review text is displayed on course page
Average updates after new rating
Non-enrolled users cannot submit reviews

FR-09.title: Payment and Subscription
requirements: Courses can be free or paid
Payment via credit card or PayPal
Subscription plans for unlimited access
Refund within 30 days of purchase
acceptance_criteria: Payment processes correctly
Paid course access granted after payment
Subscription unlocks all courses
Refund reverses access and credits payment

FR-10.title: Admin Analytics Dashboard
requirements: Admin can view total students, courses, and revenue
Charts for enrollment trends over time
Top-rated and most enrolled courses
Instructor performance metrics
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard shows accurate statistics
Charts render correctly with real data
Rankings are sorted correctly
Data refreshes on page load

FR-01.title: Build Student Registration API
FR-01.description: Create POST /api/auth/register for student accounts. POST /api/courses/:id/enroll for enrollment. GET /api/courses for browsable catalog with filters. Track enrollment in enrollments table.

FR-01.title: Build Registration and Catalog Pages
FR-01.description: Create registration form with validation. Course catalog page with cards showing title, instructor, rating, price, and enrollment count. Enroll button on each course.

FR-01.title: Create Enrollment Database Schema
FR-01.description: Design enrollments table: id, student_id (FK), course_id (FK), enrolled_at, progress_percentage, status (active/completed/dropped). Add indexes on student_id and course_id.

FR-02.title: Build Course CRUD API
FR-02.description: Create instructor endpoints: POST /api/courses (create), PATCH /api/courses/:id (update), DELETE /api/courses/:id. Nested: POST /api/courses/:id/modules, POST /api/modules/:id/lessons. Support file upload for videos and docs.

FR-02.title: Build Course Builder UI
FR-02.description: Create course creation wizard: Step 1 title/description/category. Step 2 module/lesson builder with drag-drop ordering. Step 3 media upload. Step 4 preview and publish/draft toggle.

FR-02.title: Create Course Database Schema
FR-02.description: Design courses table: id, instructor_id, title, description, category, price, status (draft/published), thumbnail_url, created_at. modules table: id, course_id, title, order. lessons table: id, module_id, title, type, content_url, duration, order.

FR-03.title: Build Video Streaming Service
FR-03.description: Implement video storage and streaming. Support adaptive bitrate. Create API to track watch progress: POST /api/lessons/:id/progress (timestamp, percentage). Resume from saved position.

FR-03.title: Build Video Player Component
FR-03.description: Create custom video player with play/pause, seek bar, playback speed selector (0.5x-2x), volume control, fullscreen toggle, and progress indicator. Auto-save position every 10 seconds.

FR-04.title: Build Quiz API
FR-04.description: Create POST /api/courses/:id/quizzes (instructor creates quiz with questions, options, correct answers, time_limit). POST /api/quizzes/:id/submit (student submits answers). Auto-grade and return score.

FR-04.title: Build Quiz UI
FR-04.description: Create quiz-taking interface with timer countdown, question navigation, radio buttons for options, submit button. Results page showing score, correct vs selected answers.

FR-04.title: Create Quiz Database Schema
FR-04.description: Design quizzes table: id, course_id, title, time_limit_minutes. questions table: id, quiz_id, text, options (JSON array), correct_option_index. quiz_submissions table: student_id, quiz_id, answers, score, submitted_at.

FR-05.title: Build Assignment API
FR-05.description: Create POST /api/courses/:id/assignments (instructor creates with title, description, due_date, max_points). POST /api/assignments/:id/submit (student uploads file). PATCH /api/submissions/:id/grade (instructor grades).

FR-05.title: Build Assignment UI
FR-05.description: Create assignment page showing description, due date, and submission form with file upload (drag-drop, max 25MB). Submission status indicator. Instructor grading interface with score input and feedback textarea.

FR-06.title: Build Progress Tracking API
FR-06.description: Create GET /api/enrollments/:id/progress returning completed lessons, total lessons, percentage. Generate certificate on 100% completion. GET /api/certificates/:id for PDF download.

FR-06.title: Build Student Dashboard
FR-06.description: Create dashboard with enrolled courses grid, each showing progress bar, completion percentage, next lesson link. Certificates section for completed courses with download button.

FR-06.title: Implement Certificate Generation
FR-06.description: Create PDF certificate template with student name, course title, completion date, and unique certificate ID. Generate on course completion. Store in certificates table for verification.

FR-07.title: Build Forum API
FR-07.description: Create CRUD for discussion threads: POST /api/courses/:id/threads, GET /api/courses/:id/threads (paginated), POST /api/threads/:id/replies. Mark instructor replies with is_instructor flag.

FR-07.title: Build Forum UI
FR-07.description: Create discussion page with thread list, new thread form, and thread detail with replies. Instructor badge on instructor replies. Sort by newest or most replies.

FR-08.title: Build Course Review API
FR-08.description: Create POST /api/courses/:id/reviews (rating 1-5, text). Verify enrollment. Calculate and cache average rating. GET /api/courses/:id/reviews with pagination and sort.

FR-08.title: Build Review Section UI
FR-08.description: Create review section on course page with star rating summary, individual review cards, and review submission form (star selector + textarea). Only visible to enrolled students.

FR-09.title: Build Payment API
FR-09.description: Create POST /api/payments/checkout (process course purchase). POST /api/subscriptions/create (subscription plan). POST /api/payments/:id/refund (within 30 days). Integrate payment gateway.

FR-09.title: Build Payment UI
FR-09.description: Create checkout page with course summary, payment method selection (card/PayPal), billing details form. Subscription plan comparison page. Purchase confirmation screen.

FR-09.title: Create Payment Database Schema
FR-09.description: Design payments table: id, user_id, course_id, amount, method, status, transaction_id, created_at. subscriptions table: user_id, plan, start_date, end_date, status. refunds table: payment_id, reason, status.

FR-10.title: Build Admin Analytics API
FR-10.description: Create GET /api/admin/analytics returning total users, courses, revenue, enrollment trends (monthly), top courses by rating and enrollment. Cache results for performance.

FR-10.title: Build Admin Dashboard
FR-10.description: Create admin analytics page with stat cards (total students, courses, revenue), line chart for enrollment trends, bar chart for top courses, table for instructor performance.
